text: I sense a curious stillness as I cross from the bright, formal entryway into this colorful, idea-filled space dedicated to R+D. The sharp lines of glass and fire safety equipment outside contrast with the energetic designs inside, where thoughts on innovation and our relationship with machines are broadcast visually and textually. I feel both anticipation and reflection—caught between the reassuring structure of the exterior and the invitation to wonder at human curiosity and possibility within. My mind is alert, questioning how these constructed environments shape my own understanding of progress.
